title: Delicately Smoked Saudi Arabian Peaches Skillet
description: A low-carb friendly Saudi Arabian dish featuring peaches, made in a cast-iron skillet and finished with a robata-grill for a smoky flavor.
instructions: Preheat the robata-grill to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, mix together smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Cut the peaches in half and remove the pits.
Brush the cut side of the peaches with ghee and sprinkle with the spice mixture.
Place the peaches cut side down on the robata-grill and cook for 2-3 minutes or until caramelized.
Flip the peaches over and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
In a cast-iron skillet, heat the remaining ghee over medium heat.
Add the grilled peaches to the skillet and pour in the lemon juice.
Simmer the peaches in the skillet for 2-3 minutes or until the liquid has reduced slightly.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley if desired and serve immediately.
